blocked_claims.claim: four consecutive public dogfood weeks completed
blocked_claims.reason: No privacy-reviewed scorecard from a real operator week has been published.

blocked_claims.claim: the workflow changed a real operator decision or action
blocked_claims.reason: No published operator review or decision receipt supports this claim.

blocked_claims.claim: the workflow saves operator time or produces user value
blocked_claims.reason: No published real-run time or value observations exist.

blocked_claims.claim: the checked-in deployment is production reliable
blocked_claims.reason: Repository tests and service files do not establish live reliability.

next_evidence_gate.blocker: Requires real operator runs plus privacy review; repository fixtures cannot satisfy this gate.
required_artifacts: source-bound decision or action receipts when an outcome is claimed
explicit unknown values for every metric that was not measured

excluded_from_public_evidence: private feedback text or voice transcripts
